tooling_sandboxing.detail: ctx_execute runs tools at the subprocess level so raw output never enters context, and a PreToolUse hook enforces sandbox routing that blocks dangerous commands (e.g. sudo, rm -rf) before execution.

context_memory.detail: A per-project SQLite database logs every file edit, git operation, task, error, and decision, with PreCompact/SessionStart hooks building an XML snapshot that restores full working state after context compaction on supported platforms.

lifecycle_hooks.detail: Registers PreToolUse (blocking, can deny execution), PostToolUse, UserPromptSubmit, PreCompact, and SessionStart hooks across supported platforms (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, VS Code Copilot).

prompt_optimization.detail: The project explicitly states it enforces no prose style and never dictates how the model writes its answer, only filtering tool output, not tuning prompts.

build_vs_buy.label: blueprint
build_vs_buy.detail: Ships as a self-hosted, config/hook-driven layer installed into existing agent platforms (nothing leaves the machine); an optional hosted Insight dashboard at context-mode.com/insight is a secondary add-on.
